channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 1 com severidade Crítica
• 10 com severidade Alta
• 19 novas CVEs
• 5 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

🚨 CVE-2026-27811 - Nginx
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.8
Resumo:
Roxy-WI is a web interface for managing Haproxy, Nginx, Apache and Keepalived servers. Prior to version 8.2.6.3, a command injection vulnerability exists in the `/config/compare/ / /show` endpoint, allowed authenticated users to execute arbitrary system commands on the app host. The vulnerability exists in `app/modules/config/config.py` on line 362, where user input is directly formatted in the template string that i...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-27811
 
📢 Balancing the scales of strategic and technical advisory for success: Elastic - ARNnet
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Elastic
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A matéria apresenta um advisory de segurança relacionado a Elastic, com informações úteis para avaliação de risco e eventual atualização.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiwAFBVV95cUxNckprcm1WV2MyZGNwXzNfcWZlOE5MaDhZMWNFaVBrdHNSVGlHQUVLWnMyZ0dOYzZpdEVrNFRmc0pzazhNU0lVQk1fVFlJRElYNzRJTXBWT0NkYmxPZVItaGJ1QTRkdHRDRWJlMG5fRURuWElrd0p5dnJkQ3Z0UHVyRFRXaklNbG83WnNTNTFhM05jMF9hNFN4R1NwdlJUUjhCV1pYQ2c3RFhKS3hYdmtpWWVvRFRFVlZ6UmctUGlCSGk?oc=5
 
📰 Payload Ransomware Uses Babuk-Inspired Encryption In Attacks On Windows and ESXi - cyberpress.org
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a ESX, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE1UQmZ6dmFnanprY2lzWmYybDRuNlcyUkFsWnBzRjJvbDV0bjB2WDN6NXZZbWs1cTFkV3BpYV9DYTJDNzlhUW9xN1ZJTlFTUzdKYUYxT3hqSHZBcDV6eUE?oc=5
 
📰 Miggo Security and Grafana Labs Partner to Deliver Frictionless Runtime Intelligence and Slash Vulnerability Noise by 90% - The Manila Times
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Grafana
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia está relacionada a Grafana no contexto de segurança da informação, com potencial relevância para monitoramento, prevenção ou resposta.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
📰 AI use cases for security analysts
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Elastic
Fonte: https://www.elastic.co/blog/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
AI is transforming the cybersecurity landscape for both threat actors and defenders. Learn how AI is being used on both sides of the battle with practical tips to help your security team up-level its AI use.
Link: https://www.elastic.co/blog/ai-use-cases-for-security-analysts
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 Critical Unpatched Telnetd Flaw (CVE-2026-32746) Enables Unauthenticated Root RCE
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 9.8
Resumo:
Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed a critical security flaw impacting the GNU InetUtils telnet daemon (telnetd) that could be exploited by an unauthenticated remote attacker to execute arbitrary code with elevated privileges. The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-32746, carries a CVSS score of 9.8 out of 10.0. It has been described as a case of out-of-bounds write in the LINEMODE Set
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/03/critical-telnetd-flaw-cve-2026-32746.html
 
🚨 Apple Fixes WebKit Vulnerability Enabling Same-Origin Policy Bypass on iOS and macOS
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Apple on Tuesday released its first round of Background Security Improvements to address a security flaw in WebKit that affects iOS, iPadOS, and macOS. The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-20643 (CVSS score: N/A), has been described as a cross-origin issue in WebKit's Navigation API that could be exploited to bypass the same-origin policy when processing maliciously crafted web content.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/03/apple-fixes-webkit-vulnerability.html
 
🚨 CVE-2025-71266 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: fs: ntfs3: check return value of indx_find to avoid infinite loop We found an infinite loop bug in the ntfs3 file system that can lead to a Denial-of-Service (DoS) condition. A malformed dentry in the ntfs3 filesystem can cause the kernel to hang during the lookup operations. By setting the HAS_SUB_NODE flag in an INDEX_ENTRY within a directory's IND...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-71266
 
🚨 CVE-2026-23242 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: RDMA/siw: Fix potential NULL pointer dereference in header processing If siw_get_hdr() returns -EINVAL before set_rx_fpdu_context(), qp->rx_fpdu can be NULL. The error path in siw_tcp_rx_data() dereferences qp->rx_fpdu->more_ddp_segs without checking, which may lead to a NULL pointer deref. Only check more_ddp_segs when rx_fpdu is present. KASAN spla...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-23242
 
🚨 Ubuntu CVE-2026-3888 Bug Lets Attackers Gain Root via systemd Cleanup Timing Exploit
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 4.0
Resumo:
A high-severity security flaw affecting default installations of Ubuntu Desktop versions 24.04 and later could be exploited to escalate privileges to the root level. Tracked as CVE-2026-3888 (CVSS score: 7.8), the issue could allow an attacker to seize control of a susceptible system. "This flaw (CVE-2026-3888) allows an unprivileged local attacker to escalate privileges to full root access
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/03/ubuntu-cve-2026-3888-bug-lets-attackers.html
 
💣 Ransomware gang exploits Cisco flaw in zero-day attacks since January
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The Interlock ransomware gang has been exploiting a maximum severity remote code execution (RCE) vulnerability in Cisco's Secure Firewall Management Center (FMC) software in zero-day attacks since late January.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/interlock-ransomware-exploited-secure-fmc-flaw-in-zero-day-attacks-since-january/
 
💣 New “Darksword” iOS exploit used in infostealer attack on iPhones
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A new exploit kit for iOS devices and delivery framework dubbed "Darksword" has been used to steal a wide range of personal information, including data from cryptocurrency wallet app.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/new-darksword-ios-exploit-used-in-infostealer-attack-on-iphones/
 
💣 The Refund Fraud Economy: Exploiting Major Retailers and Payment Platforms
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Refund fraud is now a business, with methods and tutorials sold to exploit return policies for profit. Flare shows how fraudsters turn refunds and chargebacks into a repeatable profit model.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/the-refund-fraud-economy-exploiting-major-retailers-and-payment-platforms/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 CVE-2026-2579 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.5
Resumo:
The WowStore – Store Builder & Product Blocks for WooCommerce plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to SQL Injection via the ‘search’ parameter in all versions up to, and including, 4.4.3 due to insufficient escaping on the user supplied parameter and lack of sufficient preparation on the existing SQL query. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to append additional SQL queries into already existing queri...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-2579
 
🚨 USN-8107-1: Linux kernel (AWS FIPS) vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Several security issues were discovered in the Linux kernel. An attacker could possibly use these to compromise the system. This update corrects flaws in the following subsystems: - x86 architecture; - GPIO subsystem; - GPU drivers; - MMC subsystem; - BTRFS file system; - XFRM subsystem; - IPv4 networking; - IPv6 networking; - MAC80211 subsystem; - SMC sockets; (CVE-2021-47599, CVE-2022-48875, CVE-2022-49072, CVE-202...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8107-1
 
🚨 USN-8106-1: Valkey vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that Valkey incorrectly handled errors for lua scripts. An attacker could possibly use this issue to inject arbitrary information into the response stream for other clients. (CVE-2025-67733) It was discovered that Valkey incorrectly handled malformed cluster bus messages. A remote attacker could possibly use this issue to cause Valkey to crash, resulting in a denial of service.
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8106-1
 
🚨 CVE-2025-15363 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 5.9
Resumo:
The Get Use APIs WordPress plugin before 2.0.10 executes imported JSON, which could allow users with a role as low as contributor to perform Cross-Site Scripting attacks under certain server configurations.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-15363
 
🚨 CVE-2026-2559 - Office
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 5.3
Resumo:
The Post SMTP plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to unauthorized modification of data due to a missing capability check on the `handle_office365_oauth_redirect()` function in all versions up to, and including, 3.8.0. This is due to the function being hooked to `admin_init` without any `current_user_can()` check or nonce verification. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Subscriber-level access and...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-2559
 
🚨 CVE-2026-32268 - Azure
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Azure
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The Azure Blob Storage for Craft CMS plugin provides an Azure Blob Storage integration for Craft CMS. In versions on the 2.x branch prior to 2.1.1, unauthenticated users can view a list of buckets the plugin has access to. The `DefaultController->actionLoadContainerData()` endpoint allows unauthenticated users with a valid CSRF token to view a list of buckets that the plugin is allowed to see. Because Azure can retur...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-32268
 
📢 USN-8102-2: snapd regression
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: 4.0
Resumo:
The update caused a regresision for Ubuntu 24.04 LTS while installing the package. Original advisory details: Qualys discovered that snapd incorrectly handled certain operations in the snap's private /tmp directory. If systemd-tmpfiles is enabled to automatically clean up this directory, a local attacker could possibly use this issue to re-create the deleted directory, resulting in privilege escalation.
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8102-2
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias do período de 16/03/2026 até 18/03/2026.
